data.content: Implementation review found 2 issues: (1) BLOCKING: tsc --noEmit fails on src/lib/__tests__/create-draft-persistence-contract.test.ts line 71 — the /s (dotAll) regex flag requires ES2018+ but tsconfig target is lower. Replace the /s regex with a non-dotAll approach (e.g. use [\s\S]* instead of .* with /s flag). (2) NON-BLOCKING: The diff includes unrelated changes to settings-pools-section.tsx (grid→flex layout swap) and deletes settings-pools-layout.test.ts. These should be in a separate commit or removed from this branch. Fix the tsc error at minimum before re-submitting.
